Part.Source: Event Start LoadwwPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData' UnnamedTable4.Width = 600 Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid.Rows = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &gridNfePedTmpSts = Status_SimNao.Nao if not NfeDupCreSeq.IsEmpty() and Not NfeDupCreSeq.IsNull() RetornaStatusDuplicata.call(EmpCod, NfeDupFiLCod, NfeDupCreSeq, &gridNfePedTmpSts) EndIF &gridNfeDupItmCod = NfeDupItmCod &gridNfeDupCreSeq = NfeDupCreSeq &gridNfeDupFiLCod = NfeDupFiLCod &gridNfeDupNro = NfeDupNro &gridNfeDupVlr = NfeDupVlr &gridNfeCbrCod = NfeCbrCod if &gridNfePedTmpSts = Status_SimNao.Sim &ActionDele.Enabled = 0 &gridNfeDupNro.Enabled = 0 NfeDupVct.Enabled = 0 &gridNfeDupVlr.Enabled = 0 &gridNfeCbrCod.Enabled = 0 Else &ActionDele.Enabled = 1 &gridNfeDupNro.Enabled = 1 NfeDupVct.Enabled = 1 &gridNfeDupVlr.Enabled = 1 &gridNfeCbrCod.Enabled = 1 EndiF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &ActionDele = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Enter /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' wpNota(!'Totais', !'Autorizar', false) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoNfeCapaNfe' 2 Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' wpNota(!'Totais', !'Capa', false) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoProdutosNFCe' 6 Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' wpNota(!'Totais', !'Produtos', false) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoTransmitirNFCe' 8 Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' ValidaSchemaNFe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &Context.FilCod,&Mensagem) grid.Refresh() if &Mensagem.IsEmpty() //GRAVA XML AUTORIZACAO GeraXmlNFeModelo55_4.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, 'S', &Context.PesCod, 'E', &SolCod) &WizardData.Capa.FilCod = &FilCod &WizardData.Capa.NfeCod = &NfeCod &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Capa.SolCod = &SolCod &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson()) wpNota(!'Capa', !'Autorizar', false) Else msg(&Mensagem) EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoaddParcela' wpAdicionarDuplicata.Popup(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod) Refresh RetornaTotalDuplicatasNFe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &TotMovItmVlr, &CarMovItmVlr, &TotDebVlrDup, &TotCreVlrDup, &TotalMoeda ) &Diferenca = &NfeVlrTot - &TotalMoeda /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &NfeVlrTotPro = &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotPro &NfeVlrTotFrt = &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotFrt &NfeVlrTotIpi = &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotIpi &NfeVlrTotSeg = &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotSeg &NfeVlrTotOutDsp = &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotOutDsp &NfeVlrTotDsc = &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotDsc &NfeVlrTotPdg = &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotPdg &TotNfeProVlrIcmsDes = &WizardData.Totais.TotNfeProVlrIcmsDes &NfeVlrTotBasIcms = &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotBasIcms &NfeVlrTotIcms = &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotIcms &NfeTotIcmsUfDest = &WizardData.Totais.NfeTotIcmsUfDest &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &NfeTotFPIcmsSt = &WizardData.Totais.NfeTotFPIcmsSt &NfeVlrTot = &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTot &NfeVlrTotApxTrib = &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotApxTrib &TotCreVlrDup = &WizardData.Totais.TotCreVlrDup &TotMovItmVlr = &WizardData.Totais.TotMovItmVlr &CarMovItmVlr = &WizardData.Totais.CarMovItmVlr &TotDebVlrDup = &WizardData.Totais.TotDebVlrDup &Diferenca = &WizardData.Totais.Diferenca /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else do 'loadNFce' EndIF EndSub Sub 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotPro = &NfeVlrTotPro &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotFrt = &NfeVlrTotFrt &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotIpi = &NfeVlrTotIpi &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotSeg = &NfeVlrTotSeg &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotOutDsp = &NfeVlrTotOutDsp &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotDsc = &NfeVlrTotDsc &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotPdg = &NfeVlrTotPdg &WizardData.Totais.TotNfeProVlrIcmsDes = &TotNfeProVlrIcmsDes &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotBasIcms = &NfeVlrTotBasIcms &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotIcms = &NfeVlrTotIcms &WizardData.Totais.NfeTotIcmsUfDest = &NfeTotIcmsUfDest &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &WizardData.Totais.NfeTotFPIcmsSt = &NfeTotFPIcmsSt &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTot = &NfeVlrTot &WizardData.Totais.NfeVlrTotApxTrib = &NfeVlrTotApxTrib &WizardData.Totais.TotCreVlrDup = &TotCreVlrDup &WizardData.Totais.TotMovItmVlr = &TotMovItmVlr &WizardData.Totais.CarMovItmVlr = &CarMovItmVlr &WizardData.Totais.TotDebVlrDup = &TotDebVlrDup &WizardData.Totais.Diferenca = &Diferenca &WizardData.Totais.Grid.Clear() For Each Line in Grid &GridItem = new() &GridItem.gridNfeDupItmCod = &gridNfeDupItmCod &GridItem.gridNfeDupNro = &gridNfeDupNro &GridItem.gridNfeDupVlr = &gridNfeDupVlr &GridItem.gridNfeDupFiLCod = &gridNfeDupFiLCod &GridItem.gridNfeCbrCod = &gridNfeCbrCod &GridItem.gridNfeDupCreSeq = &gridNfeDupCreSeq &GridItem.gridNfePedTmpSts = &gridNfePedTmpSts &WizardData.Totais.Grid.Add(&GridItem) EndFor &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else if &IsAutorizada <> true DO 'GetTotalIncidencia' GravaTotaisNF.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &NfeVlrTotDsc, &NfeVlrTotPdg, &NfeVlrTotOutDsp, &NfeVlrTotSeg, &NfeVlrTotFrt) Endif EndIF EndSub Event &gridNfeDupNro.IsValid do 'AtualizaDuplicata' EndEvent Event &gridNfeDupVlr.IsValid do 'AtualizaDuplicata' EndEvent Event NfeDupVct.IsValid do 'AtualizaDuplicata' EndEvent Event &gridNfeCbrCod.IsValid do 'AtualizaDuplicata' EndEvent Event &ActionDele.Click iF &gridNfePedTmpSts = Status_SimNao.Nao NovaDuplicataNFe.Call('DEL', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &gridNfeDupItmCod, &gridNfeDupNro, NfeDupVct, &gridNfeDupVlr, &gridNfeCbrCod) Refresh RetornaTotalDuplicatasNFe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &TotMovItmVlr, &CarMovItmVlr,&TotDebVlrDup, &TotCreVlrDup, &TotalMoeda ) &Diferenca = &NfeVlrTot - &TotalMoeda Else msg('Duplicatas já possui pagamentos, não é possível Eliminar/Alterar por aqui!') EndIF EndEvent Sub 'GetTotalIncidencia' For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,NfeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where NfeCod = &NfeCod If LctIncSen = Status_simNao.Sim &NfeVlrTotOutDsp += NfeTotSen EndIf If LctIncFun = Status_simNao.Sim &NfeVlrTotOutDsp += NfeTotFun EndIf &NfeVlrTotOutDsp += NfeProVlrTotInc_Formula exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'loadNFCe' btnTransmitirNFCe.Visible = 0 &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &FilCod = &WizardData.Capa.FilCod &NfeCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfeCod &EmpCod = &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod If &NfeCod = 0 wwNotas.Link() EndIF For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where NfeCod = &NfeCod &NfeVlrTotPro = NfeVlrTotPro &NfeVlrTotFrt = NfeVlrTotFrt &NfeVlrTotIpi = NfeVlrTotIpi &NfeVlrTotSeg = NfeVlrTotSeg &NfeVlrTotOutDsp = NfeVlrTotOutDsp &NfeVlrTotDsc = NfeVlrTotDsc &NfeVlrTotPdg = NfeVlrTotPdg &NfeVlrTotBasIcms = NfeVlrTotBasIcms &NfeVlrTotIcms = NfeVlrTotIcms &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = NfeVlrTotIcmsSt &NfeVlrTot = NfeVlrTot &NfeVlrTotApxTrib = NfeVlrTotApxTrib &TotNfeProVlrIcmsDes = TotNfeProVlrIcmsDes &NfeTotIcmsUfDest = NfeTotIcmsUfDest &NfeTotFPIcmsSt = NfeTotFPIcmsSt &NfeSts = NfeSts &IsAutorizada = false if NfeSts <> Status_Nfe.Digitando and NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA &IsAutorizada = true &ActionDele.Visible = 0 btnaddParcela.Visible = 0 Endif if NfeSts = Status_NFe.Digitando and NfeProTer = NOta_proPriaTerceira.PROPRIA and (NfeVlrTot > 0 or NfeVlrTotIcms > 0 or NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt > 0) btnTransmitirNFCe.Visible = 1 EndiF Exit EndFor RetornaTotalDuplicatasNFe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &TotMovItmVlr, &CarMovItmVlr, &TotDebVlrDup, &TotCreVlrDup, &TotalMoeda ) &Diferenca = &NfeVlrTot - &TotalMoeda EndSub Sub 'AtualizaDuplicata' NovaDuplicataNFe.Call('ALT', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &gridNfeDupItmCod, &gridNfeDupNro, NfeDupVct, &gridNfeDupVlr, &gridNfeCbrCod) RetornaTotalDuplicatasNFe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &TotMovItmVlr, &CarMovItmVlr, &TotDebVlrDup, &TotCreVlrDup, &TotalMoeda ) &Diferenca = &NfeVlrTot - &TotalMoeda EndSub
